description.content:
Returns a user group for a given group name.

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
Permission to access the Confluence site ('Can use' global permission).

query.description:
(Required) The name of the group. This is the same as the group name shown in
the Confluence administration console.

response.name: Returned if the requested group is returned.

Returned if the calling user does not have permission to view
groups.
Returned if the group does not exist.

description.content:
Returns a user group for a given group id.

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
Permission to access the Confluence site ('Can use' global permission).

query.description: (Required) The id of the group.

response.name: Returned if the requested group is returned.

Returned if the calling user does not have permission to view
groups.
Returned if the group does not exist.

description.content:
Delete user group.

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
User must be a site admin.

query.description: (Required) Id of the group to delete.

response.name: Returned if the group was removed successfully.
Returned if the id is missing or invalid.
Returned if the calling user is not logged in to Confluence.
Returned if the user is not a site admin.
If no user group by the given id exists.

description.content:
Returns the users that are members of a group.

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
Permission to access the Confluence site ('Can use' global permission).

query.description: (Required) The name of the group to be queried for its members.
The starting index of the returned users.

The maximum number of users to return per page.
Note, this is restricted by fixed system limit of 200 which is to say if the limit parameter
exceeds 200, this API will return a maximum of 200 users per page.

Whether to include total size parameter in the results.
Note, fetching total size property is an expensive operation; use it if your use case needs this value.

A multi-value parameter indicating which properties of the user to
expand.

  - `operations` returns the operations that the user is allowed to do.
  - `personalSpace` returns the user's personal space, if it exists.
  - `isExternalCollaborator` returns whether the user is an external collaborator user.

response.name: Returned if the requested users are returned.
Returned if the calling user does not have permission to view users.

description.content:
Returns the users that are members of a group.

Use updated Get group API

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
Permission to access the Confluence site ('Can use' global permission).

query.description: The starting index of the returned users.

The maximum number of users to return per page.
Note, this may be restricted by fixed system limits.

variable.description: (Required) The name of the group to be queried for its members.

response.name: Returned if the requested users are returned.

variable.description: (Required) The name of the group to be queried for its members.

response.name: Returned if given limit is greater than 200

variable.description: (Required) The name of the group to be queried for its members.

response.name: Returned if the calling user does not have permission to view users.

variable.description: (Required) The name of the group to be queried for its members.

item.name: Atlassian Search Groups by Partial Query

request.name: Atlassian Search Groups by Partial Query

description.content: Get search results of groups by partial query provided.

query.description: (Required) the search term used to query results.
The starting index of the returned groups.

The maximum number of groups to return per page.
Note, this is restricted to a maximum limit of 200 groups.

Whether to include total size parameter in the results.
Note, fetching total size property is an expensive operation; use it if your use case needs this value.

response.name: Returns a full JSON representation of group collection.

Returned if the calling user does not have permission to view
groups.

item.name: Atlassian Add Member to Group by Groupid

request.name: Atlassian Add Member to Group by Groupid

description.content:
Adds a user as a member in a group represented by its groupId

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
User must be a site admin.

query.description: (Required) GroupId of the group whose membership is updated

response.name: Returned if the group was created successfully.
Returned if the groupId or accountId are missing or invalid.
Returned if the calling user is not logged in to Confluence.
Returned if the user is not a site admin.
If no user group by the give name exists.

item.name: Atlassian Remove Member From Group Using Group Id

request.name: Atlassian Remove Member From Group Using Group Id

description.content:
Remove user as a member from a group.

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
User must be a site admin.

query.description: (Required) Id of the group whose membership is updated.

response.name: Returned if the group was removed successfully.
Returned if the name is missing or invalid.
Returned if the calling user is not logged in to Confluence.

Returned if the user is not a site admin.
Note: A 204 is returned if the user is not part of the
group.

If no user group by the give name exists or if no user exists
for the given accountId.

description.content: The Atlassian Confluence Group API is a tool that allows users to manage and interact with groups within the Confluence platform. With this API, administrators can create, modify, and delete groups, as well as add or remove users from these groups. It provides a seamless way to organize and control access to content, ensuring that only authorized users are able to view or edit specific pages.
